The club was coached by [[Tony Rea]], competing in [[Super League IX]] and finishing in 10th place. The club also got to the fifth round of the [[2004 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]]. ==Super League table IX== {{Super League IX ladder|London}} ==2004 Challenge Cup== For the fifth consecutive year, the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] were knocked out of the cup at the fifth round stage.{{cite web|title=2004 Challenge Cup|url=http://www.rugby-league-world.com/2004/ChallengeCup/Cup.html|publisher=Rugby
